description_long: This is a modern semi-detached house with two mirrored units, each featuring a brick-patterned facade and large rectangular windows. The front elevation displays two main entry doors, each sheltered by a flat-roofed porch supported by slender columns. The side and rear walls are finished in a lighter brick texture, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The roof is a simple gable style, running the length of the building, and the overall structure is boxy and geometric. The ground level includes paved walkways and covered carport areas on both sides, providing sheltered parking or outdoor space.
description: A modern, semi-detached brick house with two mirrored units, large windows, and flat-roofed porches. Features a gable roof and covered carports on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing two entry doors, large windows, and flat-roofed porches with columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, light brick wall, and covered carport structure.
description_view_2: Rear view with large glass doors/windows and minimal decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the gable roof, light brick wall, and carport structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Double main doors with flat-roofed porches, supported by columns and paved entry steps.
